title: Update Date Dropdown Border Color for Consistency
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the date picker dropdown borders to be consistent with other form element borders, so that the interface has a uniform visual style.
description: The date picker dropdown border color is inconsistent with other form elements. Update the border color to match the standard styling used across the application.
acceptance_criteria: Date picker dropdown border color matches other form element borders
Styling is consistent in both light and dark modes
ux_changes: Updated date picker dropdown border color to match other form element borders for visual consistency.
implementation_notes: CSS border color change for date picker dropdown elements.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the border color update and confirmed it working on staging.
